comment: Maps Discord author IDs to per-principal EA partitions and binds each partition to its principal display name, per-EA Anthropic key vault reference, and per-EA Claude agent name (Migration Plan §14.2.4 + §14.4.3; architecture v2.1 §2.2.4). Each partition lives at state/eas/<partition>/. Unmapped author IDs produce an audit-logged refusal rather than silent default routing (Δ D-015 / Migration Plan §14.2.1). The `sarah` partition (Quinn — Sarah Taylor's EA, OD-035) is staged without a Discord-ID mapping pending operator-supplied Sarah's Discord author ID; once provided, append the `<sarah-discord-id>: "sarah"` entry under `mappings`. The `quinn-runtime` vault reference is staged pending operator generation of the Anthropic key in Anthropic Console (OD-038 spawned-worker attribution per OD-012a). CC will not invent or guess either value.
